On this page

Application Solutions ​

Consumer Electronics ​

  • Household appliances
  • Wearable electronics
  • Smart sockets and lights

Industrial ​

  • Industrial wireless control
  • Wireless remote controls

Healthcare & Communication ​

  • Health products
  • Bluetooth-to-serial port devices

INFO

The XW37-BLE module is widely used in various IoT applications, providing reliable Bluetooth connectivity for both consumer and industrial products.
